entries.title: 介绍
entries.description:
Redis 是一个 `key-value` 存储系统类似 Memcached
- 它支持存储的 value 类型相对更多，包括string(字符串)、list(链表)、set(集合)、zset(sorted set 有序集合)和hash(哈希类型)
- 数据类型都支持 push/pop、add/remove 及取交集并集和差集及更丰富的操作
启动 Redis
使用 CLI 登陆 redis
使用 Telnet 的登陆 redis

entries.description:

OK
redis> GET mykey

entries.title: 一些引用(可能有帮助)
entries.description:
:- | -- :- | -- [ACL LOAD](https://redis.io/commands/acl-load) | 从配置的 ACL 文件重新加载 ACL [ACL SAVE](https://redis.io/commands/acl-save) | 将当前的 ACL 规则保存在配置的 ACL 文件中 [ACL LIST](https://redis.io/commands/acl-list) | 以 ACL 配置文件格式列出当前的 ACL 规则 [ACL USERS](https://redis.io/commands/acl-users) | 列出所有配置的ACL规则的用户名 [ACL GETUSER](https://redis.io/commands/acl-getuser) | 获取特定 ACL 用户的规则 [ACL SETUSER](https://redis.io/commands/acl-setuser) | 修改或创建特定 ACL 用户的规则 [ACL DELUSER](https://redis.io/commands/acl-deluser) | 删除指定的 ACL 用户和关联的规则 [ACL CAT](https://redis.io/commands/acl-cat) | 列出 ACL 类别或类别内的命令 [ACL GENPASS](https://redis.io/commands/acl-genpass) | 生成用于 ACL 用户的伪随机安全密码 [ACL WHOAMI](https://redis.io/commands/acl-whoami) | 返回关联到当前连接的用户的名称 [ACL LOG](https://redis.io/commands/acl-log) | 列出由于 ACL 到位而被拒绝的最新事件 [ACL HELP](https://redis.io/commands/acl-help) | 显示有关ACL访问控制的帮助信息 [BGREWRITEAOF](https://redis.io/commands/bgrewriteaof) | 异步重写 append-only 文件 [BGSAVE](https://redis.io/commands/bgsave) | 将数据集异步保存到磁盘 [CONFIG GET](https://redis.io/commands/config-get) | 获取配置参数的值 [CONFIG REWRITE](https://redis.io/commands/config-rewrite) | 用内存中的配置重写配置文件 [CONFIG SET](https://redis.io/commands/config-set) | 将配置参数设置为给定值 [CONFIG RESETSTAT](https://redis.io/commands/config-resetstat) | 重置 INFO 返回的统计数据 [DBSIZE](https://redis.io/commands/dbsize) | 返回所选数据库中的键数 [DEBUG OBJECT](https://redis.io/commands/debug-object) | 获取某个key的调试信息 [DEBUG SEGFAULT](https://redis.io/commands/debug-segfault) | 使服务器崩溃 [FLUSHALL](https://redis.io/commands/flushall) | 从所有数据库中删除所有密钥 [FLUSHDB](https://redis.io/commands/flushdb) | 从当前数据库中删除所有键 [LOLWUT](https://redis.io/commands/lolwut) | 显示一些计算机信息和 Redis 版本 [LASTSAVE](https://redis.io/commands/lastsave) | 获取上次成功保存到磁盘的 UNIX 时间戳 [MEMORY DOCTOR](https://redis.io/commands/memory-doctor) | 输出内存问题报告 [MEMORY HELP](https://redis.io/commands/memory-help) | 显示有关内存的使用帮助 [MEMORY MALLOC-STATS](https://redis.io/commands/memory-malloc-stats) | 显示分配器内部统计 [MEMORY PURGE](https://redis.io/commands/memory-purge) | 要求分配器释放内存 [MEMORY STATS](https://redis.io/commands/memory-stats) | 显示内存使用详情(该死，运维的我经常用到) [MEMORY USAGE](https://redis.io/commands/memory-usage) | 估计一个键的内存使用 [MODULE LIST](https://redis.io/commands/module-list) | 列出服务器加载的所有模块 [MODULE LOAD](https://redis.io/commands/module-load) | 加载模块 [MODULE UNLOAD](https://redis.io/commands/module-unload) | 卸载模块 [MONITOR](https://redis.io/commands/monitor) | 实时监听服务器收到的所有请求 [SAVE](https://redis.io/commands/save) | 将数据集同步保存到磁盘 [SHUTDOWN](https://redis.io/commands/shutdown) | 将数据集同步保存到磁盘，然后关闭服务器 [~~SLAVEOF~~](https://redis.io/commands/slaveof) | 使服务器成为另一个实例的副本，或将其提升为主服务器
_(从Redis 5开始弃用，改成 `REPLICAOF`了)_ [REPLICAOF](https://redis.io/commands/replicaof) | 使服务器成为另一个实例的副本，或将其提升为主服务器 [SLOWLOG](https://redis.io/commands/slowlog) | 管理 Redis 慢查询日志 [SWAPDB](https://redis.io/commands/swapdb) | 交换两个Redis数据库 [SYNC](https://redis.io/commands/sync) | 用于复制的内部命令(主) [PSYNC](https://redis.io/commands/psync) | 用于复制的内部命令(备) [LATENCY DOCTOR](https://redis.io/commands/latency-doctor) | 返回人类可读的延迟分析报告 [LATENCY GRAPH](https://redis.io/commands/latency-graph) | 返回事件的延迟图 [LATENCY HISTORY](https://redis.io/commands/latency-history) | 返回事件的时间戳延迟样本 [LATENCY LATEST](https://redis.io/commands/latency-latest) | 返回所有事件的最新延迟样本 [LATENCY RESET](https://redis.io/commands/latency-reset) | 重置一个或多个事件的延迟数据 [LATENCY HELP](https://redis.io/commands/latency-help) | 显示有关不同子命令的有用文本

entries.title: COMMAND COUNT
entries.description:
**例子**
获取 Redis 命令总数
entries.code:
redis> COMMAND COUNT
(integer) 217

entries.title: COMMAND GETKEYS
entries.description:
**例子**
给定完整的 Redis 命令提取密钥
entries.code:
redis> COMMAND GETKEYS MSET a b c d e f
1) "a"
2) "c"
3) "e"
redis> COMMAND GETKEYS EVAL "not consulted" 3 key1 key2 key3 arg1 arg2 arg3 argN
1) "key1"
2) "key2"
3) "key3"
redis> COMMAND GETKEYS SORT mylist ALPHA STORE outlist
1) "mylist"
2) "outlist"

entries.title: COMMAND INFO
entries.description:
**例子**
获取特定 Redis 命令详细信息的数组
entries.code:
redis> COMMAND INFO get set eval
1) 1) "get"
   2) (integer) 2
   3) 1) "readonly"
      2) "fast"
   4) (integer) 1
   5) (integer) 1
   6) (integer) 1
   7) 1) "@read"
      2) "@string"
      3) "@fast"
2) 1) "set"
   2) (integer) -3
   3) 1) "write"
      2) "denyoom"
   4) (integer) 1
   5) (integer) 1
   6) (integer) 1
   7) 1) "@write"
      2) "@string"
      3) "@slow"
3) 1) "eval"
   2) (integer) -3
   3) 1) "noscript"
      2) "movablekeys"
   4) (integer) 0
   5) (integer) 0
   6) (integer) 0
   7) 1) "@slow"
      2) "@scripting"

entries.title: INFO
entries.description:

获取有关服务器的信息和统计信息
entries.code:
redis> INFO
# Server
redis_version:6.1.240

redis_git_dirty:0
redis_build_id:a26db646ea64a07c
redis_mode:standalone
os:Linux 5.4.0-1017-aws x86_64
......

entries.title: ROLE
entries.description:
**例子**
返回实例在复制上下文中的角色
entries.code:
redis> ROLE
1) "master"
2) (integer) 0
3) (empty list or set)

entries.title: TIME
entries.description:
**例子**
返回当前服务器时间
Redis一些通用的命令

entries.title: 一些引用(可能有帮助)
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
[COPY](https://redis.io/commands/copy)       | 复制键值对
[MIGRATE](https://redis.io/commands/migrate) | 以原子方式将键值对从 Redis 实例传输到另一个实例
[MOVE](https://redis.io/commands/move)       | 将键值对移动到另一个数据库
[OBJECT](https://redis.io/commands/object)   | 检查 Redis 对象的内部结构
[RESTORE](https://redis.io/commands/restore) | 使用提供的序列化值创建键值对，之前使用 DUMP 获得
[SORT](https://redis.io/commands/sort)       | 对列表、集合或有序集合中的元素进行排序
[WAIT](https://redis.io/commands/wait)       | 等待在当前连接的上下文中发送的所有写命令的同步复制
[SCAN](https://redis.io/commands/scan)       | 增量迭代键空间

entries.title: DEL
entries.description:
**例子**
删除键值对
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> SET key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> DEL key1 key2 key3
(integer) 2

entries.title: DUMP
entries.description:
**例子**
返回存储在指定键中的值的序列化版本
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey 10
"OK"
redis> DUMP mykey
"\u0000\xC0\n\t\u0000\xBEm\u0006\x89Z(\u0000\n"

entries.title: EXISTS
entries.description:
**例子**
判断键值对是否存在
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXISTS key1
(integer) 1
redis> EXISTS nosuchkey
(integer) 0
redis> SET key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> EXISTS key1 key2 nosuchkey
(integer) 2

entries.title: EXPIRE
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键值对的生存时间(以秒为单位)
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXPIRE mykey 10
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) 10
redis> SET mykey "Hello World"
"OK"
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) -1

entries.title: EXPIREAT
entries.description:
**例子**
将键值对的到期时间设置为 UNIX 时间戳
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXISTS mykey
(integer) 1
redis> EXPIREAT mykey 1293840000
(integer) 1
redis> EXISTS mykey
(integer) 0

entries.title: KEYS
entries.description:
**例子**
查找与给定模式匹配的所有键
entries.code:
redis> MSET firstname Jack lastname Stuntman age 35
"OK"
redis> KEYS *name*
1) "firstname"
2) "lastname"
redis> KEYS a??
1) "age"
redis> KEYS *
1) "firstname"
2) "age"
3) "lastname"

entries.title: PERSIST
entries.description:
**例子**
从键值对中删除过期时间
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXPIRE mykey 10
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) 10
redis> PERSIST mykey
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) -1

entries.title: PEXPIRE
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键的生存时间(以毫秒为单位)
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> PEXPIRE mykey 1500
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) 1
redis> PTTL mykey
(integer) 1499

entries.title: PEXPIREAT
entries.description:
**例子**
将键值对的到期时间设置为以毫秒为单位指定的 UNIX 时间戳
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> PEXPIREAT mykey 1555555555005
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) -2
redis> PTTL mykey
(integer) -2

entries.title: PTTL
entries.description:
**例子**
以毫秒为单位获取键值对的生存时间
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXPIRE mykey 1
(integer) 1
redis> PTTL mykey
(integer) 1000

entries.title: RENAME
entries.description:
**例子**
重命名键值对
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> RENAME mykey myotherkey
"OK"
redis> GET myotherkey
"Hello"

entries.title: RENAMENX
entries.description:
**例子**
重命名键值对，仅当新键值对不存在时
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> SET myotherkey "World"
"OK"
redis> RENAMENX mykey myotherkey
(integer) 0
redis> GET myotherkey
"World"

entries.title: TOUCH
entries.description:
**例子**
更改键值对的最后访问时间。返回指定的现有键的数量
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> SET key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> TOUCH key1 key2
(integer) 2

entries.title: TTL
entries.description:
**例子**
获得一个键的值的时间(有点绕口，但意思是对的)
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> EXPIRE mykey 10
(integer) 1
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) 10

entries.title: TYPE
entries.description:
**例子**
确定存储在键中的类型
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "value"
"OK"
redis> LPUSH key2 "value"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key3 "value"
(integer) 1
redis> TYPE key1
"string"
redis> TYPE key2
"list"
redis> TYPE key3
"set"

entries.title: UNLINK
entries.description:
**例子**
在另一个线程中异步删除一个键。否则它就像 DEL，但不是阻塞的
Redis 连接相关的命令
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> SET key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> UNLINK key1 key2 key3
(integer) 2

entries.title: 一些引用(可能有帮助)
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
[AUTH](https://redis.io/commands/auth)                       | 向服务器进行身份验证
[CLIENT CACHING](https://redis.io/commands/client-caching)   | 指示服务器在下一个请求中是否跟踪键
[CLIENT KILL](https://redis.io/commands/client-kill)         | 终止客户端的连接
[CLIENT LIST](https://redis.io/commands/client-list)         | 获取客户端连接列表
[CLIENT GETNAME](https://redis.io/commands/client-getname)    | 获取当前连接名称
[CLIENT GETREDIR](https://redis.io/commands/client-getredir)  | 获取跟踪通知重定向客户端 ID(如果有)
[CLIENT PAUSE](https://redis.io/commands/client-pause)       | 停止处理来自客户端的命令一段时间
[CLIENT REPLY](https://redis.io/commands/client-reply)       | 指示服务器是否回复命令
[CLIENT SETNAME](https://redis.io/commands/client-setname)   | 设置当前连接名称
[CLIENT TRACKING](https://redis.io/commands/client-tracking) | 启用或禁用服务器辅助客户端缓存支持
[CLIENT UNBLOCK](https://redis.io/commands/client-unblock)   | 取消阻止来自不同连接的阻塞命令中阻塞的客户端
[HELLO](https://redis.io/commands/hello)                     | 切换Redis协议
[QUIT](https://redis.io/commands/quit)                        | 关闭连接
[RESET](https://redis.io/commands/reset)                      | 重置连接
[SELECT](https://redis.io/commands/select)                   | 更改为当前连接选择的数据库

entries.title: CLIENT ID
entries.description:
**例子**
返回当前连接的客户端 ID
entries.code:
redis> CLIENT ID
ERR Unknown or disabled command 'CLIENT'

entries.title: CLIENT INFO
entries.description:
**例子**
返回有关当前客户端连接的信息。
entries.code:
redis> CLIENT INFO
"id=55542 addr=127.0.0.1:58710 laddr=127.0.0.1:6379 fd=8 name= age=114920 idle=0 flags=N db=0 sub=0 psub=0 multi=-1 qbuf=26 qbuf-free=40928 argv-mem=10 obl=0 oll=0 omem=0 tot-mem=61466 events=r cmd=client user=default redir=-1\n"

entries.title: ECHO
entries.description:
**例子**
回显给定的字符串
entries.code:
redis> ECHO "Hello World!"
"Hello World!"

entries.title: PING
entries.description:
**例子**
ping 服务器
Redis 字符串类型设置
entries.code:
redis> PING
"PONG"
redis> PING "hello world"
"hello world"

entries.title: APPEND
entries.description:
**例子**
将值附加到键,可以理解为追加作用
entries.code:
redis> EXISTS mykey
(integer) 0
redis> APPEND mykey "Hello"
(integer) 5
redis> APPEND mykey " World"
(integer) 11
redis> GET mykey
"Hello World"

entries.title: BITCOUNT
entries.description:
**例子**
计算字符串中的集合位
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "foobar"
"OK"
redis> BITCOUNT mykey
(integer) 26
redis> BITCOUNT mykey 0 0
(integer) 4
redis> BITCOUNT mykey 1 1
(integer) 6

entries.title: BITFIELD
entries.description:
**例子**
对字符串执行任意位域整数运算
entries.code:
redis> BITFIELD mykey INCRBY i5 100 1 GET u4 0
1) (integer) 1
2) (integer) 0

entries.title: BITOP
entries.description:
**例子**
在字符串之间执行按位运算
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "foobar"
"OK"
redis> SET key2 "abcdef"
"OK"
redis> BITOP AND dest key1 key2
(integer) 6
redis> GET dest
"`bc`ab"

entries.title: BITPOS
entries.description:
**例子**
查找字符串中设置或清除的第一位
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "\xff\xf0\x00"
"OK"
redis> BITPOS mykey 0
(integer) 12
redis> SET mykey "\x00\xff\xf0"
"OK"
redis> BITPOS mykey 1 0
(integer) 8
redis> BITPOS mykey 1 2
(integer) 16
redis> set mykey "\x00\x00\x00"
"OK"
redis> BITPOS mykey 1
(integer) -1

entries.title: DECR
entries.description:
**例子**
将键的整数值减一
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "10"
"OK"
redis> DECR mykey
(integer) 9
redis> SET mykey "234293482390480948029348230948"
"OK"
redis> DECR mykey
ERR ERR value is not an integer or out of range

entries.title: DECRBY
entries.description:
**例子**
将键的整数值减去给定的数字
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "10"
"OK"
redis> DECRBY mykey 3
(integer) 7

entries.title: GET
entries.description:
**例子**
获取key的值
entries.code:
redis> GET nonexisting
(nil)
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> GET mykey
"Hello"

entries.title: GETBIT
entries.description:
**例子**
返回存储在 `key` 处的字符串值中 `offset` 处的位值
entries.code:
redis> SETBIT mykey 7 1
(integer) 0
redis> GETBIT mykey 0
(integer) 0
redis> GETBIT mykey 7
(integer) 1
redis> GETBIT mykey 100
(integer) 0

entries.title: GETRANGE
entries.description:
**例子**
获取存储在键中的字符串的子字符串
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "This is a string"
"OK"
redis> GETRANGE mykey 0 3
"This"
redis> GETRANGE mykey -3 -1
"ing"
redis> GETRANGE mykey 0 -1
"This is a string"
redis> GETRANGE mykey 10 100
"string"

entries.title: GETSET
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键的字符串值并返回其旧值
entries.code:
redis> INCR mycounter
(integer) 1
redis> GETSET mycounter "0"
"1"
redis> GET mycounter
"0"

entries.title: INCR
entries.description:
**例子**
将键的整数值加一
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "10"
"OK"
redis> INCR mykey
(integer) 11
redis> GET mykey
"11"

entries.title: MSETNX
entries.description:
**例子**
仅当不存在任何键时，将多个键设置为多个值
entries.code:
redis> MSETNX key1 "Hello" key2 "there"
(integer) 1
redis> MSETNX key2 "new" key3 "world"
(integer) 0
redis> MGET key1 key2 key3
1) "Hello"
2) "there"
3) (nil)

entries.title: INCRBYFLOAT
entries.description:
**例子**
将键的浮点值增加给定的数量
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey 10.50
"OK"
redis> INCRBYFLOAT mykey 0.1
"10.6"
redis> INCRBYFLOAT mykey -5
"5.6"
redis> SET mykey 5.0e3
"OK"
redis> INCRBYFLOAT mykey 2.0e2
"5200"

entries.title: MGET
entries.description:
**例子**
获取所有给定键的值
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> SET key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> MGET key1 key2 nonexisting
1) "Hello"
2) "World"
3) (nil)

entries.title: MSET
entries.description:
**例子**
将多个键设置为多个值
entries.code:
redis> MSET key1 "Hello" key2 "World"
"OK"
redis> GET key1
"Hello"
redis> GET key2
"World"

entries.title: INCRBY
entries.description:
**例子**
将键的整数值增加给定的数量
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "10"
"OK"
redis> INCRBY mykey 5
(integer) 15

entries.title: PSETEX
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键的值和过期时间(以毫秒为单位)
entries.code:
redis> PSETEX mykey 1000 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> PTTL mykey
(integer) 1000
redis> GET mykey
"Hello"

entries.title: SET
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键的字符串值,可以理解为创建、设置、重设的作用
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello"
"OK"
redis> GET mykey
"Hello"
redis> SET anotherkey "will expire in a minute" EX 60
"OK"

entries.title: SETBIT
entries.description:
**例子**
设置或清除存储在键中的字符串值中偏移量处的位
entries.code:
redis> SETBIT mykey 7 1
(integer) 0
redis> SETBIT mykey 7 0
(integer) 1
redis> GET mykey
"\u0000"

entries.title: SETEX
entries.description:
**例子**
设置密钥的值和过期时间
entries.code:
redis> SETEX mykey 10 "Hello"
"OK"
redis> TTL mykey
(integer) 10
redis> GET mykey
"Hello"

entries.title: SETNX
entries.description:
**例子**
设置键的值，仅当键不存在时
entries.code:
redis> SETNX mykey "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> SETNX mykey "World"
(integer) 0
redis> GET mykey
"Hello"

entries.title: SETRANGE
entries.description:
**例子**
覆盖从指定偏移量开始的键处的字符串的一部分
entries.code:
redis> SET key1 "Hello World"
"OK"
redis> SETRANGE key1 6 "Redis"
(integer) 11
redis> GET key1
"Hello Redis"

entries.title: STRLEN
entries.description:
**例子**
获取存储在键中的值的长度
entries.code:
redis> SET mykey "Hello world"
"OK"
redis> STRLEN mykey
(integer) 11
redis> STRLEN nonexisting
(integer) 0

entries.title: STRALGO
entries.description:
**例子**
针对字符串运行算法(目前为 LCS)
Redis 集合类型设置
entries.code:
redis> STRALGO LCS KEYS key1 key2 IDX
1) "matches"
2) 1) 1) 1) (integer) 4
         2) (integer) 7
      2) 1) (integer) 5
         2) (integer) 8
   2) 1) 1) (integer) 2
         2) (integer) 3
      2) 1) (integer) 0
         2) (integer) 1
3) "len"
4) (integer) 6

entries.title: SADD
entries.description:
**例子**
将一个或多个成员添加到集合
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "World"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "World"
(integer) 0
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "Hello"
2) "World"

entries.title: SCARD
entries.description:
**例子**
获取集合中的成员数
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "World"
(integer) 1
redis> SCARD myset
(integer) 2

entries.title: SDIFF
entries.description:
**例子**
减去多组
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SDIFF key1 key2
1) "a"
2) "b"

entries.title: SDIFFSTORE
entries.description:
**例子**
减去多个集合并将结果集合存储在一个键中
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SDIFFSTORE key key1 key2
(integer) 2
redis> SMEMBERS key
1) "a"
2) "b"

entries.title: SINTER
entries.description:
**例子**
交叉多个集合
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SINTER key1 key2
1) "c"

entries.title: SINTERSTORE
entries.description:
**例子**
将多个集合相交并将结果集合存储在一个键中
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SINTERSTORE key key1 key2
(integer) 1
redis> SMEMBERS key
1) "c"

entries.title: SISMEMBER
entries.description:
**例子**
确定给定值是否是集合的成员
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SISMEMBER myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SISMEMBER myset "two"
(integer) 0

entries.title: SMISMEMBER
entries.description:
**例子**
返回与集合的给定元素关联的成员资格
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 0
redis> SMISMEMBER myset "one" "notamember"
1) (integer) 1
2) (integer) 0

entries.title: SMEMBERS
entries.description:
**例子**
获取集合中的所有成员
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "World"
(integer) 1
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "Hello"
2) "World"

entries.title: SMOVE
entries.description:
**例子**
将成员从一组移到另一组
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "two"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myotherset "three"
(integer) 1
redis> SMOVE myset myotherset "two"
(integer) 1
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "one"
redis> SMEMBERS myotherset
1) "two"
2) "three"

entries.title: SPOP
entries.description:
**例子**
从集合中删除并返回一个或多个随机成员
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "two"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "three"
(integer) 1
redis> SPOP myset
"two"
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "one"
2) "three"
redis> SADD myset "four"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "five"
(integer) 1
redis> SPOP myset 3
1) "four"
2) "five"
3) "three"
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "one"

entries.title: SRANDMEMBER
entries.description:
**例子**
从一组中获取一个或多个随机成员
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset one two three
(integer) 3
redis> SRANDMEMBER myset
"three"
redis> SRANDMEMBER myset 2
1) "two"
2) "three"
redis> SRANDMEMBER myset -5
1) "one"
2) "two"
3) "three"
4) "three"
5) "one"

entries.title: SREM
entries.description:
**例子**
从集合中删除一个或多个成员
entries.code:
redis> SADD myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "two"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD myset "three"
(integer) 1
redis> SREM myset "one"
(integer) 1
redis> SREM myset "four"
(integer) 0
redis> SMEMBERS myset
1) "two"
2) "three"

entries.title: SUNION
entries.description:
**例子**
添加多组
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SUNION key1 key2
1) "a"
2) "c"
3) "e"
4) "b"
5) "d"

entries.title: SUNIONSTORE
entries.description:
**例子**
添加多个集合并将结果集合存储在一个键中
Redis 列表类型设置
entries.code:
redis> SADD key1 "a"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "b"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key1 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "c"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "d"
(integer) 1
redis> SADD key2 "e"
(integer) 1
redis> SUNIONSTORE key key1 key2
(integer) 5
redis> SMEMBERS key
1) "a"
2) "c"
3) "e"
4) "b"
5) "d"

entries.title: 一些引用(可能有帮助)
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
[BRPOPLPUSH](https://redis.io/commands/brpoplpush) | 从列表中弹出一个元素，将其推入另一个列表并返回；或阻塞直到有一个可用
[BLMOVE](https://redis.io/commands/blmove)         | 从列表中弹出一个元素，将其推入另一个列表并返回；或阻塞直到有一个可用

entries.title: BLPOP
entries.description:
**例子**
删除并获取列表中的第一个元素，或者阻塞直到有一个元素可用
entries.code:
redis> DEL list1 list2
(integer) 0
redis> RPUSH list1 a b c
(integer) 3
redis> BLPOP list1 list2 0
1) "list1"
2) "a"

entries.title: BRPOP
entries.description:
**例子**
删除并获取列表中的最后一个元素，或者阻塞直到有一个可用
entries.code:
redis> DEL list1 list2
(integer) 0
redis> RPUSH list1 a b c
(integer) 3
redis> BRPOP list1 list2 0
1) "list1"
2) "c"

entries.title: LINDEX
entries.description:
**例子**
通过索引从列表中获取元素
entries.code:
redis> LPUSH mylist "World"
(integer) 1
redis> LPUSH mylist "Hello"
(integer) 2
redis> LINDEX mylist 0
"Hello"
redis> LINDEX mylist -1
"World"
redis> LINDEX mylist 3
(nil)

entries.title: LINSERT
entries.description:
**例子**
在列表中的另一个元素之前或之后插入一个元素
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "World"
(integer) 2
redis> LINSERT mylist BEFORE "World" "There"
(integer) 3
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "Hello"
2) "There"
3) "World"

entries.title: LLEN
entries.description:
**例子**
获取列表的长度
entries.code:
redis> LPUSH mylist "World"
(integer) 1
redis> LPUSH mylist "Hello"
(integer) 2
redis> LLEN mylist
(integer) 2

entries.title: LPOP
entries.description:
**例子**
删除并获取列表中的第一个元素
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> LPOP mylist
"one"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "two"
2) "three"

entries.title: LPOS
entries.description:
**例子**
返回列表中匹配元素的索引
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist a b c d 1 2 3 4 3 3 3
(integer) 11
redis> LPOS mylist 3
(integer) 6
redis> LPOS mylist 3 COUNT 0 RANK 2
1) (integer) 8
2) (integer) 9
3) (integer) 10

entries.title: LPUSH
entries.description:
**例子**
将一个或多个元素添加到列表中
entries.code:
redis> LPUSH mylist "world"
(integer) 1
redis> LPUSH mylist "hello"
(integer) 2
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "hello"
2) "world"

entries.title: LPUSHX
entries.description:
**例子**
仅当列表存在时才将元素添加到列表中
entries.code:
redis> LPUSH mylist "World"
(integer) 1
redis> LPUSHX mylist "Hello"
(integer) 2
redis> LPUSHX myotherlist "Hello"
(integer) 0
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "Hello"
2) "World"
redis> LRANGE myotherlist 0 -1
(empty list or set)

entries.title: LRANGE
entries.description:
**例子**
从列表中获取一系列元素
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 0
1) "one"
redis> LRANGE mylist -3 2
1) "one"
2) "two"
3) "three"
redis> LRANGE mylist -100 100
1) "one"
2) "two"
3) "three"
redis> LRANGE mylist 5 10
(empty list or set)

entries.title: LREM
entries.description:
**例子**
从列表中删除元素
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "hello"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "hello"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "foo"
(integer) 3
redis> RPUSH mylist "hello"
(integer) 4
redis> LREM mylist -2 "hello"
(integer) 2
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "hello"
2) "foo"

entries.title: LSET
entries.description:
**例子**
通过索引设置列表中元素的值
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> LSET mylist 0 "four"
"OK"
redis> LSET mylist -2 "five"
"OK"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "four"
2) "five"
3) "three"

entries.title: LTRIM
entries.description:
**例子**
将列表修剪到指定范围
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> LTRIM mylist 1 -1
"OK"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "two"
2) "three"

entries.title: RPOP
entries.description:
**例子**
删除并获取列表中的最后一个元素
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> RPOP mylist
"three"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "one"
2) "two"

entries.title: RPOPLPUSH
entries.description:
**例子**
删除列表中的最后一个元素，将其添加到另一个列表中并返回
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> RPOPLPUSH mylist myotherlist
"three"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "one"
2) "two"
redis> LRANGE myotherlist 0 -1
1) "three"

entries.title: LMOVE
entries.description:
**例子**
从列表中弹出一个元素，将其推入另一个列表并返回
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "one"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "two"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSH mylist "three"
(integer) 3
redis> LMOVE mylist myotherlist RIGHT LEFT
"three"
redis> LMOVE mylist myotherlist LEFT RIGHT
"one"
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "two"
redis> LRANGE myotherlist 0 -1
1) "three"
2) "one"

entries.title: RPUSH
entries.description:
**例子**
将一个或多个元素附加到列表
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "hello"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSH mylist "world"
(integer) 2
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "hello"
2) "world"

entries.title: RPUSHX
entries.description:
**例子**
仅当列表存在时才将元素附加到列表
Redis 哈希类型设置
entries.code:
redis> RPUSH mylist "Hello"
(integer) 1
redis> RPUSHX mylist "World"
(integer) 2
redis> RPUSHX myotherlist "World"
(integer) 0
redis> LRANGE mylist 0 -1
1) "Hello"
2) "World"
redis> LRANGE myotherlist 0 -1
(empty list or set)

entries.title: HDEL
entries.description:
**例子**
删除一个或多个哈希字段

(integer) 1

(integer) 1
redis> HDEL myhash field2
(integer) 0

entries.description:

判断哈希字段是否存在

redis> HEXISTS myhash field1
(integer) 1
redis> HEXISTS myhash field2
(integer) 0

entries.title: HGET
entries.description:
**例子**
获取哈希字段的值

(integer) 1
redis> HGET myhash field1
"foo"

entries.title: HGETALL

获取哈希中的所有字段和值

1) "field1"

entries.title: HINCRBY
entries.description:

将哈希字段的整数值增加给定的数字

(integer) 1

(integer) -5

将哈希字段的浮点值增加给定的数量

"10.6"

"5.6"

entries.title: HKEYS

获取哈希中的所有字段

(integer) 1

(integer) 1

1) "field1"
2) "field2"

entries.title: HLEN
entries.description:
**例子**
获取哈希中的字段数

(integer) 1
redis> HSET myhash field2 "World"
(integer) 1
redis> HLEN myhash
(integer) 2

获取所有给定哈希字段的值

(integer) 1

(integer) 1

entries.title: HMSET

将多个哈希字段设置为多个值

entries.title: BZPOPMIN
entries.description:
**例子**
从一个或多个排序集合中删除并返回得分最低的成员，或者阻塞直到一个可用
entries.code:
redis> DEL zset1 zset2
(integer) 0
redis> ZADD zset1 0 a 1 b 2 c
(integer) 3
redis> BZPOPMIN zset1 zset2 0
1) "zset1"
2) "a"
3) "0"

entries.title: BZPOPMAX
entries.description:
**例子**
从一个或多个排序集合中删除并返回得分最高的成员，或者阻塞直到一个可用
entries.code:
redis> DEL zset1 zset2
(integer) 0
redis> ZADD zset1 0 a 1 b 2 c
(integer) 3
redis> BZPOPMAX zset1 zset2 0
1) "zset1"
2) "c"
3) "2"

entries.title: ZADD
entries.description:
**例子**
将一个或多个成员添加到有序集合中，或者更新其分数(如果它已经存在)
entries.code:
redis> ZADD myzset 1 "one"
(integer) 1
redis> ZADD myzset 1 "uno"
(integer) 1
redis> ZADD myzset 2 "two" 3 "three"
(integer) 2
redis> ZRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES
1) "one"
2) "1"
3) "uno"
4) "1"

entries.title: 一些引用(可能有帮助)
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
[XINFO](https://redis.io/commands/xinfo)           | 获取有关流和消费者组的信息
[XDEL](https://redis.io/commands/xdel)             | 从流中删除指定的条目。返回实际删除的项目数，如果某些 ID 不存在，则可能与传递的 ID 数不同
[XREAD](https://redis.io/commands/xread)           | 返回多个流中从未见过的元素，其 ID 大于调用者为每个流报告的 ID
[XGROUP](https://redis.io/commands/xgroup)         | 创建、销毁和管理消费者组
[XREADGROUP](https://redis.io/commands/xreadgroup) | 使用消费者组从流中返回新条目，或访问给定消费者的待处理条目的历史记录
[XCLAIM](https://redis.io/commands/xclaim)         | 更改(或获取)消费者组中消息的所有权，就好像消息已传递给指定的消费者一样
[XPENDING](https://redis.io/commands/xpending)     | 从流消费者组待定条目列表中返回信息和条目，这些信息是已获取但从未确认的消息

entries.title: XADD
entries.description:
**例子**
将新条目附加到流
entries.code:
redis> XADD mystream * name Sara surname OConnor
"1609040574632-0"
redis> XADD mystream * field1 value1 field2 value2 field3 value3
"1609040574632-1"
redis> XLEN mystream
(integer) 2
redis> XRANGE mystream - +
1) 1) "1609040574632-0"
   2) 1) "name"
      2) "Sara"
      3) "surname"
      4) "OConnor"
2) 1) "1609040574632-1"
   2) 1) "field1"
      2) "value1"
      3) "field2"
      4) "value2"
      5) "field3"
      6) "value3"

"1609040575750-0"
redis> XTRIM mystream MAXLEN 2
(integer) 0
redis> XRANGE mystream - +
1) 1) "1609040575750-0"
   2) 1) "field1"
      2) "A"
      3) "field2"
      4) "B"
      5) "field3"
      6) "C"
      7) "field4"
      8) "D"

   2) 1) "name"
      2) "Virginia"
      3) "surname"
      4) "Woolf"
2) 1) "1609040578002-1"

      2) "Jane"

entries.title: XACK
entries.description:
**例子**
将待处理消息标记为已正确处理，有效地将其从消费者组的待处理条目列表中删除，该命令的返回值是成功确认的消息数，即我们实际能够在 `PEL` 中解析的 `ID`
集群方面的东西
entries.code:
redis> XACK mystream mygroup 1526569495631-0
ERR Unknown or disabled command 'XACK'

entries.title: 节点、集群
entries.description:
